title: Vulkan Motion Blur
description: A motion blur mod compatible with Vulkan.
body:
Looking for a smooth motion blur mod for vulkan? Well here's one that's compatible with Vulkan, Sodium, and Vanilla!

What does it do?
This mod gives you a smooth motion blur experience with a simple gui/command to configure it!

- Easy to Configure
- Compatible with Vulkan, Sodium, and Vanilla.

/motionblur <percent>: to change the strength of blur

**Exponential Fade** — Switches the falloff from a flat linear fade to an exponential curve

![Ingame GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44c5ae3306e152a50d2818caf70e859d0f0ebd06.png)
